versions.description: MVP — YouTube URL → Spleeter separation → p5.js live preview → MP4 export
changes: Audio feature extraction (RMS + 5 frequency bands at 30fps)
p5.js live preview with Web Audio API
Offline deterministic MP4 render with Pillow + ffmpeg
Docker Compose deployment (backend, worker, frontend, redis)
Full test suite (87 backend + 27 frontend tests)
